top_emotional_moments.text: Thanks again so much for listening to another live stream episode of Dog Man Encounters Radio.
If you missed last week's show, you really missed a notable one.

We had a guest come on, Donna Huff, who had a very traumatic experience when she was standing in the bathroom of a guest home that she had been living in in California at the time, about 20 years ago.
Well, unfortunately, as she was looking at herself in the mirror getting ready to go to dinner,
unfortunately, a dog man reached through a window behind her and just scared the life out of her.
Well, last week she came on and went into great detail talking about that experience and some other experiences as well,
but we ran out of time. We didn't have time to actually ask her questions so that we could really get to the bottom of that.

But luckily, she agreed to come back on tonight's show and go into detail, more detail about that experience and answer questions that you have for in the live chat, as well as some questions that I'm going to have for her.
